results.title: Tajinder, Pollard lead MI New York to come-from-behind win over Seattle Orcas
results.description: Stoinis' five-for and Seifert's 81 went in vain as Orcas collapsed dramatically

results.title: Legion Baseball: Devils Lake Sweeps Parkston, Vermillion At Clark Tourney
results.description: CLARK — Devils Lake, North Dakota, earned a 7-0 victory over Parkston in the Clark Rotary American Legion baseball tournament on Friday.

results.title: Guardians beat Marlins 3-2 behind Parker Messick’s 6 strong innings
results.description: MIAMI (AP) — Parker Messick gave up one hit and one run in six strong innings, Chase DeLauter hit a home run, and the Cleveland Guardians beat the Miami Marlins 3-2 on Friday night.

results.title: Men’s State Am: Defending champ Bowen Mauss will meet Cameron Crawford in championship match
results.description: Local golf: Defending champ Bowen Mauss advances to State Am finals, where the ASU sophomore will meet Lehi's Cameron Crawford at Soldier Hollow Golf Club

results.title: Yamal says France should fear Spain in their much-anticipated World Cup semifinal
